strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks, and founding an open-source platform
concerns: Current title is Staff/Senior Software Engineer, not Principal/Director-level IC; limited evidence of org-wide technical leadership
No advanced degree in AI and no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale
Limited explicit cloud-platform strategy or executive-level customer/partner advisory experience

key_factors.factor: Breadth of engineering experience and craftsmanship
Director-level IC scope and strategic advisory track record

response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of versatile engineering experience, an entrepreneurial open-source track record, and emerging exposure to AI-agent tooling, which aligns with parts of the role. However, the position targets a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, and strategic advisory experience with cloud/AI customers — areas where the resume shows limited evidence, making the fit partial rather than strong.
